mentions.note: Interview with CEO Michael Intrader on Squawk on Street; won huge order from Anthropic; Cramer pressed on profitability path, Intrader candid (could be profitable in 3 months but opportunity too large); transparency rewarded with 11% stock gain.
Aggressive buy; infrastructure provider for AI data centers; new company with lots of debt; expect volatility but fundamentals terrific.

Pure-play neocloud; $100B backlog visibility. Revenue ramp $13B→$25B→$40B (2026–2028); 2028 EPS $3.36, 2029 $6.92. Key risk: backlog-to-profit conversion post-debt/power. Cheaper than Nvidia's last stake price.
